nodes.title: 02 ComfyUI-RMBG：像素/卡通全身人物专用
64B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
64D 主体色由20B控制（加黑边后总色数约16～32）
21 保存所选尺寸/颜色透明PNG单帧成品
22 所选单帧最近邻放大到512×512（只预览）
23 所选64/80/100/128/256全身单帧像素级检查预览
P1 GPT Image 2 原始输出（1024×1024）
P3 最近邻放大64×64结构（仅预览）
P3 缩小到64×64后的全身像素结构
P4 最近邻放大64×64可选色结果（仅预览）
P4 64×64可选色量化结果（黑边前）
P2B RMBG前景Mask预览（白色必须完整）
80B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
80D 主体色由20B控制（加黑边后总色数约16～32）
100B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
100D 主体色由20B控制（加黑边后总色数约16～32）
00A 可选参考图：仅图生图模式使用
00B 生图模式：1=文生图 / 2=图生图
01B GPT Image 2 全身图生图（00B选择2，使用00A参考图）
widgets_values:
Transform the provided reference into one production-ready full-body pixel-art character animation-frame reference of the same character.
Preserve the character's identity, face, hairstyle, hair length, clothing, accessories, colors, body proportions and age.
Show exactly one complete character from the top of the hair to the soles of both feet. The whole body, both arms, both hands, both legs and both feet must be visible. This is a single full-body sprite frame, not a portrait, bust or close-up.
Use a strict front-facing orthographic view and a neutral symmetrical idle standing pose. Keep the head level, shoulders even, arms relaxed with a small clear gap from the torso, legs slightly separated and both feet resting on the same horizontal baseline. No foreshortening or perspective distortion.
Center the character and make the full figure occupy about 72–80% of the square canvas height, leaving even empty space above the hair, beside the widest hair or clothing, and below the feet. Preserve a clean readable silhouette suitable for later animation-frame matching.
Retro 2D game pixel art with deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, a clean dark 1-pixel-style outer silhouette, flat color regions and controlled two-step cel shading. Keep facial features, hands, footwear, clothing layers and accessories simple enough to remain readable after reduction to 64x64.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient, for clean background removal.
One character and one pose only. No sprite sheet, animation strip, multiple frames, turnaround, extra character, duplicate limbs, missing limbs, cropped hair, cropped feet, sitting, jumping, action pose, scenery, floor, cast shadow, decorative frame, text, logo, glow, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, blur, painterly brushwork or smooth gradients.

nodes.title: 01A GPT Image 2 文生图（首行改角色，00B选择1）
widgets_values:
Create one Miku as a production-ready full-body pixel-art character animation-frame reference.
Show exactly one complete character from the top of the hair to the soles of both feet. The whole body, both arms, both hands, both legs and both feet must be visible. This is a single full-body sprite frame, not a portrait, bust or close-up.
Use a strict front-facing orthographic view and a neutral symmetrical idle standing pose. Keep the head level, shoulders even, arms relaxed with a small clear gap from the torso, legs slightly separated and both feet resting on the same horizontal baseline. No foreshortening or perspective distortion.
Center the character and make the full figure occupy about 72–80% of the square canvas height, leaving even empty space above the hair, beside the widest hair or clothing, and below the feet. Preserve a clean readable silhouette suitable for later animation-frame matching.
Retro 2D game pixel art with deliberate pixel clusters, crisp hard edges, a clean dark 1-pixel-style outer silhouette, flat color regions and controlled two-step cel shading. Keep facial features, hands, footwear, clothing layers and accessories simple enough to remain readable after reduction to 64x64.
Use a completely solid flat magenta background (#FF00FF), with no texture and no gradient, for clean background removal.
One character and one pose only. No sprite sheet, animation strip, multiple frames, turnaround, extra character, duplicate limbs, missing limbs, cropped hair, cropped feet, sitting, jumping, action pose, scenery, floor, cast shadow, decorative frame, text, logo, glow, photorealism, 3D rendering, antialiasing, blur, painterly brushwork or smooth gradients.

nodes.title: 128B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
128D 主体色由20B控制（加黑边后总色数约16～32）
20B 输出总色数：16～32（默认24；超出范围会自动限制）
20C 自动限制到16～32并减1预留黑边（无需修改）
256B 可选 Perfect Pixel（默认旁路）
256D 主体色由20B控制（加黑边后总色数约16～32）

groups.title: A GPT Image 2 付费像素人物全身单帧生成区
B 人物透明化与64×64输出（Perfect Pixel默认旁路）
E 保存所选尺寸/颜色单帧与最近邻预览
F 重要步骤诊断预览（从左到右）
G 可选图生图：只改00B，1关闭/2开启
K 输出颜色控制：直接选择总16～32色（自动为黑边预留1色）

qgn_navigation_groups.groupName: 【📦文生图可选】多人提示词编辑

【🔍预览】提示词与文本缓存预览
